name: Survive after hell
short_description: A classic first-person shooter in which we have to survive among hordes of monsters and demonic creatures, eventually reaching Satan himself.
detailed_description:
Survive after hell - classic first person shooter with good old 90s shooter mechanics.
You have to play for a woman, for fun, sent to another world, by higher powers, to kill Satan himself, while holding a good old minigun and a grenade launcher in your hands. During the game you will find information about incidents and what you got yourself into by the will of the Gods.
about_the_game:
Survive after hell - classic first person shooter with good old 90s shooter mechanics.
You have to play for a woman, for fun, sent to another world, by higher powers, to kill Satan himself, while holding a good old minigun and a grenade launcher in your hands. During the game you will find information about incidents and what you got yourself into by the will of the Gods.
supported_languages: English, Russian, Japanese, Bulgarian, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Norwegian, Danish, Traditional Chinese, Polish
